final:
module register_8bit(
    input  clk,
    input  rst,
    input  enable,
    input  [8-1:1-1] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);

always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
    if (rst) begin
        data_out <= 8'b00000000;
    end else if (enable) begin
        data_out <= data_in;
    end
end

endmodule
